name: product-operating-model
description: Product Operating Model toolkit — intake funnel, four-question Discovery gate, WSJF scoring, product/platform/enabling layers, runway management, and structural validation. Optional industry overlays.

plugins.name: pom-core
plugins.description: Operate a Product Operating Model portfolio: ingest, score (WSJF), gate (4-question), route, promote, validate. Ships with the generic industry baseline.

plugins.name: pom-insurance
plugins.description: Insurance overlay for POM: rubric, regulatory Q4 framing, starter enabling standards (state filing, actuarial review).

plugins.name: pom-fintech
plugins.description: Fintech overlay for POM: rubric, consumer-protection Q4 framing, PCI/KYC starter enabling standards.

plugins.name: pom-healthcare
plugins.description: Healthcare overlay for POM: rubric, HIPAA/clinical-safety Q4 framing, PHI/interoperability starter enabling standards.

plugins.name: pom-retail
plugins.description: Retail overlay for POM: rubric, PCI/accessibility Q4 framing, omnichannel starter enabling standards.
